stepHelp.model: Choose the wheelchair platform that fits your lifestyle.
stepHelp.frame: Pick the chassis color and surface finish.
stepHelp.wheels: Choose the drive wheel style and tire color.
stepHelp.upholstery: Set the seat and back fabric.
stepHelp.backrest: Tune backrest height and lumbar support.
stepHelp.accessories: Add the extras that fit your daily routine.

miniAir.name: Mini Air
miniAir.description: Ultralight rigid-frame active chair tuned for everyday performance.

standard.name: Standard
standard.description: Classic folding manual wheelchair with push handles, padded armrests and swing-away footrests.
standard.feat2: Full padded armrests and calf-strap footrests
standard.feat3: Built-in push handles and tipping bars

summary.title: Your build
summary.subtitle: Review every decision before requesting a quote.
summary.disclaimer: Indicative pricing. Final quote includes fitting assessment, shipping, and applicable taxes.

compat.elevatingNoArmrests: Elevating footrests are recommended together with armrests for stability.
compat.highBackrestHeadrest: High backrest pairs beautifully with the headrest.
compat.solidWheelsGlossFrame: Solid wheels are not available with a gloss frame finish. Choose matte or satin.
compat.magFoamWeight: Mag wheels with foam upholstery slightly increases total weight.
compat.whiteTiresMaintenance: White tires need more frequent cleaning to keep their look.
compat.lumbarLowBackrest: Lumbar support requires a mid or high backrest.
compat.elevatingNoAntiTip: Anti-tip bars are strongly recommended with elevating footrests.
compat.deskArmrestsSideGuards: Desk armrests pair nicely with side guards for table clearance.
compat.standardMagWheels: Mag wheels work on the Standard frame but slightly increase the overall weight.
compat.standardNoArmrests: The Standard model is designed with armrests — consider keeping at least desk-length armrests for stability.

quote.title: Request a personalized quote
quote.subtitle: Submit your build and a specialist will follow up shortly.

quote.submitted: Thank you — your build has been saved.
quote.submittedBody: A specialist will contact you shortly with a detailed quote and the nearest fitter.
